query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS still_test_tagged,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_tags,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson NOT LIKE '%TEST%' AND tagsJson IS NOT NULL AND tagsJson != 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS real_tagged,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM hands;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3SoCqzRfnhrz7B5.fc077db4ca74 --database BFa4yaxy9c4cDn5az6aTTB --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS still_test_tagged,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_tags,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson NOT LIKE '%TEST%' AND tagsJson IS NOT NULL AND tagsJson != 'NULL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS real_tagged,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM hands;
